>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>



















































────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                  This text is centered!
                  It centers the whole block by default.
                  In that way you can do stuff like this:

               ██████  ████████ ███████ ██████  ███    ███
               ██   ██    ██    ██      ██   ██ ████  ████
               ██████     ██    █████   ██████  ██ ████ ██
               ██         ██    ██      ██   ██ ██  ██  ██
               ██         ██    ███████ ██   ██ ██      ██


                          This text is centered!
                             But each line is
                                 centered
                                separately

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                  This text is centered!
                  It centers the whole block by default.
                  In that way you can do stuff like this:

               ██████  ████████ ███████ ██████  ███    ███
               ██   ██    ██    ██      ██   ██ ████  ████
               ██████     ██    █████   ██████  ██ ████ ██
               ██         ██    ██      ██   ██ ██  ██  ██
               ██         ██    ███████ ██   ██ ██      ██


                          This text is centered!
                             But each line is
                                 centered
                                separately

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                  This text is centered!
                  It centers the whole block by default.
                  In that way you can do stuff like this:

               ██████  ████████ ███████ ██████  ███    ███
               ██   ██    ██    ██      ██   ██ ████  ████
               ██████     ██    █████   ██████  ██ ████ ██
               ██         ██    ██      ██   ██ ██  ██  ██
               ██         ██    ███████ ██   ██ ██      ██


                          This text is centered!
                             But each line is
                                 centered
                                separately
